name: Infused Oils- Five Flavor Oil "China Moon
recipeIngredient: 3 large Scallions, green & white (cut in thick rings)
1 1/2 tsp Chile Flakes, dried red (shockingly pungent)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except the lemon zest in a heavy, non-aluminum saucepan measuring 1 to 1 1/2 quarts.
2. Place a deep-fry thermometer on the rim of the pot.
3. Over moderately low heat, bring the mixture to a bubbly temperature of 225°F (stirring occasionally).
4. Let simmer for 15 minutes, checking that the temperature does not rise above 225°F.
5. Remove from the heat and let cool or refrigerate overnight.
6. Strain the oil without pressing the solids; then discard the solids.
7. Store the oil in an impeccably clean glass jar at a cool room temperature.
